summary: Elegant Vanilla Seaon shopping and leisure bag. The bag is made in beige color. It has a main compartment that can be closed with a press, a small inner pocket and a large front pocket. The bag is very spacious, so it...
descriptionLong: Elegant Vanilla Seaon shopping and leisure bag. The bag is made in beige color. It has a main compartment that can be closed with a press, a small inner pocket and a large front pocket. The bag is very spacious, so it can be used not only for your shopping, but also as a hand bag that you take to the beach or the swimming pool. The long handles allow for comfortable carrying over the shoulder. The bag is made of ripstop fake cotton.
